column10: Who are the greatest living Shieldsmiths and Armorsmiths?
column11: I want to get a list of the most famous, legendary, "best in their field" craftsmen for Armorsmithing and Shieldsmithing. I plan to then dive into this list for potential odyssey material and/or to learn new techniques/skills/ranks for those crafts.

column10: Can you we aethermancy in any way to enable dragon-blooded to fly?   Note Additional Researchers: Zeryth, Rayla, Trench, and SoVah (8KDQZ).  Please also note that Zeryth is himself a half-dragon.  Also note in addition to my lores I have Military Experience: Dhakaar
column11: I want to fly.  I'm sure there would be all kinds of limits on it if possible, or it could only be used outside combat or something, but man would it be cool.

column9: Matthias's Journal (AI: World Tree Faith) & The Greenwood Library (called "Little Alex") & Consult An Expert - Lore: Nature
column10: The different trunks of the World Tree, their general locations and functions, and how and when travel to and from them is possible. Also looking for instances of the word "wellspring"
column11: Figure out which Trunk of the World Tree is at The Wellspring and where that is. We think it is in the Death Realms, and that it is the place where items diverted from prisoners of the obliete go. Like, for instance, a crown and a tear.
